challenge.explanation:
Da biste pronašli tačan odgovor, potražite reči povezane sa bezbednošću u tekstu.

Korišćenje helps detect vulnerabilities with security plugins je važno. Ovo nas obaveštava da Visual Studio Code ima specijalne alate dizajnirane za detekciju sigurnosnih problema.

Tekst takođe pominje built-in security features to protect the codebase, pokazujući da je sigurnost veoma važna.
challenge.instructions: Pročitajte tekst i odgovorite na pitanje koje se nalazi ispod.

questions.text:
Jake veoma želi da tim koristi Visual Studio Code, pa je pokušao da ih motiviše ovim e-mailom:

Visual Studio Code is a popular choice for development because it is lightweight and customizable. It offers many extensions to meet the needs of different teams and comes with built-in security features to protect the codebase. Since it's flexible, it works well for various types of projects.

The tool makes teamwork easier by supporting version control, so developers can track changes to the code. It also helps with code refactoring, improving the structure of the code when needed. It's useful for large teams working on complex projects.

Besides, Visual Studio Code helps detect vulnerabilities with security plugins and offers strong debugging tools. These features make it easier to maintain high-quality, secure software.

Šta čini Visual Studio Code dobrom opcijom za programere koji se bave bezbednošću?

answers.answer: Ima alate i ugrađene funkcije za sigurnost koje detektuju ranjivosti.

answers.feedback: Dokumentacija ne mora direktno da rešava probleme sa kodom.

answers.answer: Pružava interno kreiran razgovor za bezbednosne diskusije.

answers.feedback: Iako je praćenje promena važno, to nije slučaj ovde.

challenge.title: Vežba 75
